items.example: She wore a matching scarf and gloves set.
She always looks chic in her tailored black dress.
His outfit was a bit dull, just grey trousers and a plain white shirt.
He bought a striped shirt with blue and white alternating bands.
Her scruffy jeans were covered in paint stains.
A waterproof jacket is essential for hiking in rainy weather.
His loud Hawaiian shirt was hard to miss at the party.
She prefers baggy sweaters over tight-fitting tops.
She loves shopping for vintage dresses from the 1960s.
I bought this coat second-hand at a charity shop.
